add-png-image-to-pdf-page.title: Add PNG Image to PDF Page Using PdfFileMend
add-png-image-to-pdf-page.description: Demonstrates how to bind an existing PDF with PdfFileMend, insert a PNG image onto page two at specific coordinates, and save the modified document.

replace-jpeg-with-bmp-using-replaceimage.title: Replace JPEG with Higher‑Resolution BMP Using ReplaceImage
replace-jpeg-with-bmp-using-replaceimage.description: Demonstrates how to create a PDF with an embedded JPEG, generate a higher‑resolution BMP in memory, and replace the original image on the first page using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfContentEditor.ReplaceImage.

overlay-semi-transparent-gif-on-pdf.title: Overlay Semi-Transparent GIF onto PDF Image
overlay-semi-transparent-gif-on-pdf.description: Demonstrates how to overlay a semi‑transparent GIF onto an existing PDF page that already contains a PNG, using CompositingParameters with BlendMode.Normal.

add-word-wrapped-footer-to-pdf.title: Add Word‑by‑Word Wrapped Footer to PDF Pages
add-word-wrapped-footer-to-pdf.description: Shows how to add a formatted text footer that automatically wraps word‑by‑word across the page width using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.

add-promotional-text-multiple-pdf-pages.title: Add Promotional Text to Multiple PDF Pages
add-promotional-text-multiple-pdf-pages.description: Demonstrates inserting the same promotional text on pages 3, 5, and 7 of a PDF using PdfFileMend.AddText with an array of page numbers.

add-multi-line-text-left-margin-page-3.title: Add Multi‑Line Text with Custom Line Spacing to Left Margin of Page 3
add-multi-line-text-left-margin-page-3.description: Demonstrates how to insert a multi‑line text block with custom line spacing into the left margin of the third page of a PDF using the Aspose.Pdf Facades API.

add-image-and-text-watermark-to-pdf.title: Add Image and Text Watermark to PDF Pages
add-image-and-text-watermark-to-pdf.description: Demonstrates how to overlay a semi‑transparent image and centered text as a watermark on each page of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

add-background-png-to-all-pdf-pages.title: Add Background PNG to All PDF Pages
add-background-png-to-all-pdf-pages.description: Demonstrates how to overlay a PNG image as a full‑page background on every page of a PDF using the PdfFileMend facade.

add-header-image-to-pdfs.title: Add Header Image to PDFs
add-header-image-to-pdfs.description: Shows how to attach a header image to each page of multiple PDF documents and save the modified files using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.

batch-add-logo-to-pdf-pages.title: Batch Add Logo to PDF Pages
batch-add-logo-to-pdf-pages.description: Shows how to iterate through a folder of PDF files and overlay a PNG company logo at the top‑right corner of each page using Aspose.Pdf.

insert-png-signature-image-every-pdf-pag.title: Insert PNG Signature Image on Every PDF Page
insert-png-signature-image-every-pdf-pag.description: Shows how to use PdfFileMend to add a PNG signature image to the bottom‑left corner of each page in a PDF document.

add-tiff-image-to-last-pdf-page.title: Add TIFF Image to Last Page of PDF with PdfFileMend
add-tiff-image-to-last-pdf-page.description: Demonstrates using PdfFileMend to bind an existing PDF, determine its last page, and embed a TIFF image onto that page without altering the existing content.

add-image-to-all-pdf-pages-dynamic-posit.title: Add Image to All PDF Pages with Dynamic Positioning
add-image-to-all-pdf-pages-dynamic-posit.description: Demonstrates loading a PDF, calculating each page's dimensions, and placing an image at the bottom‑right corner of every page using the PdfFileMend facade.

validate-image-format-before-calling-add.title: Validate Image Format Before Calling Addimage To Ensure Only Jpg Png Gif Bmp Or Tiff Files Are Used

add-image-to-pdf-with-pdffilemend.title: Add Image to PDF Using PdfFileMend with Try‑Finally
add-image-to-pdf-with-pdffilemend.description: Demonstrates how to bind a PDF, add an image stamp to a page, save the modified document, and guarantee resource cleanup with a try‑finally block that calls Close().

add-images-to-pdf-with-error-handling.title: Add Images to PDF with Error Handling
add-images-to-pdf-with-error-handling.description: Demonstrates how to insert multiple images into a PDF using Aspose.Pdf's PdfFileMend class while catching and logging any exceptions that occur for individual image files.

add-image-and-text-audit-pdf.title: Add Image and Text to PDF with Audit Logging
add-image-and-text-audit-pdf.description: Demonstrates how to insert an image and a text annotation into a PDF using Aspose.Pdf facades while logging each operation with timestamps for audit purposes.

configure-word-wrapping-bywords.title: Configure Word Wrapping ByWords and Add Wrapped Text
configure-word-wrapping-bywords.description: Demonstrates enabling word‑wrap, setting the wrap mode to ByWords, and adding a long paragraph that automatically wraps within a defined rectangle using the PdfFileMend facade.

add-image-to-pdf-page.title: Add Image to Specific PDF Page
add-image-to-pdf-page.description: Shows how to insert an image onto a chosen PDF page at given rectangle coordinates using Aspose.Pdf's PdfFileMend facade.

add-image-to-pdf-get-memorystream.title: Add Image to PDF and Return MemoryStream
add-image-to-pdf-get-memorystream.description: Shows how to bind an existing PDF with Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfFileMend, add an image to the first page, and return the modified document as a MemoryStream ready for an HTTP response.

async-add-image-to-pdf.title: Asynchronously Add Image to PDF with PdfFileMend
async-add-image-to-pdf.description: Shows how to add an image to a specific page of a PDF file asynchronously by wrapping the synchronous PdfFileMend operations in Task.Run, including argument validation and cancellation support.

extract-images-from-pdf-to-png.title: Extract Images from PDF to PNG
extract-images-from-pdf-to-png.description: Shows how to use Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfExtractor to extract every image from a PDF document and save each one as an individual PNG file.

extract-images-from-pdf-pages-2-5.title: Extract Images from PDF Pages 2‑5
extract-images-from-pdf-pages-2-5.description: Shows how to extract all images from a specific page range in a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfExtractor and save them to a temporary directory.

batch-extract-images-from-pdfs.title: Batch Extract Images from PDFs with Page‑Based Naming
batch-extract-images-from-pdfs.description: The example splits each PDF into single‑page files, extracts all images from each page, and saves them as PNG files named with the original PDF name, page number, and image index.

remove-image-from-pdf-page.title: Remove Image from PDF Page using Aspose.Pdf
remove-image-from-pdf-page.description: Demonstrates how to delete a specific image identified by its object ID from a given page of a PDF document using Aspose.Pdf's PdfContentEditor.

remove-all-images-from-pdf.title: Remove All Images from a PDF
remove-all-images-from-pdf.description: Shows how to load a PDF, delete every image on all pages using Aspose.Pdf.Facades, and save the modified document to a new file.

replace-lowres-images-with-highres-png.title: Replace Low-Resolution Images with High-Resolution PNGs in PDF
replace-lowres-images-with-highres-png.description: Shows how to iterate through PDF pages and replace each embedded image with a high‑resolution PNG using Aspose.Pdf's PdfContentEditor.

verify-free-text-annotation-coordinates.title: Verify Free Text Annotation Coordinates with PdfContentEditor
verify-free-text-annotation-coordinates.description: Shows how to add a free‑text annotation to a PDF using PdfContentEditor and unit‑test that its rectangle matches the expected X and Y coordinates.
